global_colors_info=”{}”]

A backplane is a compute/storage server subsystem with a series of hot-pluggable connectors (or slots) that allow a server to access multiple drives with various industry-standard control interfaces such as SGPIO for SAS/SATA and VPP/SHP/NPEM/UBM for NVMe storage.

The AMI MG series of controllers allows customers to design a backplane that supports all existing standard interfaces/protocols, as well as SAS/SATA, NVMe U.2/U.3 and EDSFF drives. Multiple controllers can be cascaded to support up to 32 Drives.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_toggle title=”MG Series Features ” open_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” closed_toggle_text_color=”#000000″ closed_toggle_background_color=”#FFFFFF” icon_color=”#000000″ toggle_icon=”$||divi||400″ use_icon_font_size=”on” icon_font_size=”24px” open_icon_color=”#000000″ open_toggle_icon=”!||divi||400″ open_use_icon_font_size=”on” open_icon_font_size=”24px” disabled_on=”off|off|off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” title_text_color=”#000000″ title_font=”–et_global_heading_font|700||on|||||” title_font_size=”14px” title_letter_spacing=”3px” title_line_height=”2em” closed_title_font=”Aptos|700|||||||” body_font=”||||||||” body_line_height=”1.8em” custom_margin=”20px||10px||false|false” animation_style=”slide” animation_direction=”left” animation_delay=”200ms” animation_intensity_slide=”5%” border_radii=”on|10px|10px|10px|10px” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

  • Low-cost single-chip solution
  • Ready to use, no firmware programming required
  • Supports LED/drive management through UBM/VPP/SHP/NPEM/SGPIO
  • Supports IBPI specifications (SFF8489)
  • Supports up to 3 LEDs per drive slot
  • Provides LED notifications for activity, fail/rebuild, and locate for each drive
  • Cascade as many as 4 controllers to support up to 32 drives
  • Firmware upgradable through SMBUS from host BMC
  • Diagnostics and firmware update tools available for Windows and Linux
  • Available in QFN-64, TQFP-48 and VBGA 144-pin packages

The AMI MG series of controllers allows customers to design a backplane that supports all existing standard […]
